name: Dropdown
summary: The single-select concrete member of the droplist family — a button-triggered, non-filtering listbox with type-ahead. A form-associated custom element (<drop-list>) so <form>/FormData/reset/validity work like the native <select> baseline, with no hidden input shim.
designDecisions: Single-select is structural identity, not a runtime preference: selection.model=single is locked by the trait language and cannot be overridden by an ambient intent — a multi-dropdown is a different concrete block (multi-select-dropdown), not a configuration of this one. This is the two-channel rule established by the droplist family.

Form-associated custom element: implements static formAssociated = true and uses ElementInternals.setFormValue, so <form>/FormData/reset/validity, bfcache restore, <label for>, setValidity(), :user-valid/:user-invalid, and the autocomplete attribute all light up without a hidden <input> shim.

Generic over data, scoped by injector: the options attribute resolves through the ancestor injector chain (e.g. options="@countries") or accepts an inline JSON literal; resolved options are re-exposed on the element's own injector as the component-local @options context, so descendants of <drop-list> read them and anything outside cannot.

Event boundary: the inner selection trait fires selection-change inside the template; the class listens at the <drop-list> element, calls stopPropagation, updates @selected via the value setter, and re-emits a public change event consumers listen for with on:change. The internal context stays private; the external surface stays narrow.

attributes.name: options
attributes.description: Data source for the listbox — an injector reference (e.g. `options="@countries"`) resolved through the ancestor injector chain, or an inline JSON literal.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The selected option's value, reflected to the form-associated element so `<form>`/FormData/reset see it.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name the selected value is submitted under (native form-association, no hidden input shim).

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the control; excluded from form submission and the tab order.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Marks the control required for `:user-invalid` / constraint validation.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Gets or sets the current selection; setting updates the form value and re-emits the public `change` event.

properties.name: options
properties.description: The resolved option set, re-exposed on the component-local `@options` injector context for descendants.

events.name: change
events.description: Fires when the user commits a new selection; `detail` carries the selected value. Re-emitted at the `<drop-list>` boundary after the internal `selection-change` is stopped.

cssParts.name: trigger
cssParts.description: The button that opens the listbox and shows the current selection.

ariaListbox.usage: A button-triggered `role="listbox"` of `role="option"`; the trigger owns `aria-expanded` / `aria-controls`, the active option `aria-selected`, with one selected value reflected to the form-associated element.

htmlSelectTypeAhead.usage: Printable-key type-ahead jumps to the next option whose label starts with the typed buffer, matching native `<select>` behaviour.
